findings.problem: Uses 'oz' for cup measurement: 'ice-cold beer or artisanal coleslaw' - 'cup' used as measure
findings.fix: Replace 'cup' with 'glass' or 'bottle' for beer, 'portion' for coleslaw

findings.problem: Recommends 'dry-aging beef mince for 3 days' - this is anti-consensus for smash burgers which rely on fresh beef for proper crust formation
findings.fix: Change to: 'Blend in 20% short rib or chuck for extra richness, or use freshly ground beef with higher fat content (80/20) for juicier patties'

findings.problem: 'Gherkin and tomato salad' is not a consensus SA side for burgers - gherkins (pickles) are American, SA serves with chutney, tomato onion, or simple salads
findings.fix: Change to: 'Tomato and onion sambals, chutney, or simple coleslaw'

findings.problem: 'Impossible patties' is a brand-specific recommendation - anti-consensus for generic cookbook
findings.fix: Change to: 'Plant-based mince or thick portobello caps smashed on the griddle work remarkably well'

findings.problem: Missing chef_upgrade field - required field is empty
findings.fix: Add chef_upgrade: 'Make a soffrito base with finely diced onion, carrot and celery - slow-cook for 20 minutes until sweet. Finish with a splash of cream and fresh Parmesan for restaurant-quality depth'

findings.problem: 'higher ratio of yolks to whites (3 yolks to 1 whole egg) for richer sauce with less cholesterol impact' - nutritionally incorrect, yolks contain all the cholesterol
findings.fix: Change to: 'Use extra egg whites (2 whites to 3 yolks) for higher protein with lighter texture. Add peas or courgette ribbons for volume without compromising flavour'

findings.problem: 'shrimp paste can be swapped for fermented soybean paste' - shrimp paste (kapi) is essential for authentic Thai flavor, this substitution fundamentally changes the dish
findings.fix: Change to: 'Plant-forward: use tofu puffs or young green jackfruit - both absorb curry beautifully. Omit shrimp paste for vegan version - the curry paste base still provides depth'

findings.problem: 'Rinsing basmati rice - makes it mushy instead of separate grains' - this is factually wrong for breyani; rinsing rice is essential to remove starch and prevent mushy texture
findings.fix: Change to: 'Not rinsing rice enough - the excess starch makes grains sticky and mushy. Rinse until water runs clear'

findings.problem: 'Use cultured butter for probiotic benefits' - baking butter at high temperatures destroys probiotics, this is misleading
findings.fix: Change to: 'Use cultured butter (82% fat) for deeper flavour and better lamination. Replace 30% of white flour with wholegrain for fibre'

findings.problem: Missing sides field - required field is empty
findings.fix: Add sides: ['Simple cucumber salad with rice vinegar', 'Soy sauce and chilli oil on the side', 'Spring onion slices for garnish']

findings.problem: Missing mistakes field - required field is empty
findings.fix: Add mistakes: ['Using hot rice - gets mushy and sticky, use day-old cold rice', 'Not using high heat - rice steams instead of frying', 'Overcrowding pan - rice stewes instead of crisping', 'Not seasoning oil first - garlic burns before rice is added']

findings.problem: 'Not enough chickpeas - dense, mealy texture' - this is vague and doesn't address the actual common mistake (using canned chickpeas vs properly soaked dried ones)
findings.fix: Change to: 'Using canned chickpeas - too wet and soft, must use dried chickpeas soaked overnight'

findings.problem: 'Add 60 g pine nuts or walnuts' - pine nuts are not traditional in Greek gemista, feta is more appropriate
findings.fix: Change to: 'Use proper Greek feta in brine for filling. Add fresh dill and mint to rice mixture. Top with extra-virgin olive oil before serving'

findings.problem: 'Garlic bread' is not a traditional SA side for mac and cheese - SA serves with pap, bread, or simple salads
findings.fix: Change to: 'Crusty bread, pap, or roasted bread'

findings.problem: Missing mistakes field - required field is empty
findings.fix: Add mistakes: ['Not using enough oil - garlic and chilli need fat to bloom', 'Burning garlic - bitter flavour dominates', 'Under-reducing tomatoes - sauce too watery', 'Not al dente pasta - mushy texture doesn't hold up to spicy sauce']

findings.problem: Missing sides field - required field is empty
findings.fix: Add sides: ['Simple green salad with lemon dressing', 'Crusty bread', 'Glass of red wine', 'Parmesan shavings']

findings.problem: Missing mistakes field - required field is empty
findings.fix: Add mistakes: ['Overcooking steak - tough and chewy, should be medium-rare', 'Not resting meat - juices run out when cut', 'Skimping on peri-peri - needs proper kick', 'Using wrong bread - must be crusty roll that holds sauce']

findings.problem: Missing sides field - required field is empty
findings.fix: Add sides: ['Potato chips or crisps', 'Simple tomato salad', 'Portuguese rolls or bread', 'Ice-cold beer']

findings.problem: Missing storage field - required field is empty
findings.fix: Add storage: 'Best eaten immediately. Steak can be marinated overnight in fridge. Peri-peri butter keeps 2 weeks refrigerated - bring to room temperature before serving'

findings.problem: Missing storage field - required field is empty
findings.fix: Add storage: 'Keeps 3 days refrigerated - sauce improves. Reheat gently with splash of pasta water. Pasta freezes well for 1 month - thaw completely before reheating'

findings.problem: 'Make pastry with 180 g flour, 90 g cold butter, 2 egg yolks' - proportions are off, standard quiche pastry is 2:1 flour:butter ratio
findings.fix: Change to: 'Make pastry with 200 g flour, 100 g cold butter, 1 egg yolk, 2 tbsp ice water - proper shortcrust ratio. Blind-bake with baking beans for 15 min at 200°C'
